hero_section.headline: Stop Playing Calendar Tetris Across Time Zones
hero_section.subheadline: The scheduling tool that instantly finds meeting times everyone can actually attend—no more endless Slack threads asking 'when works for you?'
hero_section.supporting_text: Free 14-day trial • No credit card required • Setup in 2 minutes

pain_points.title: The 47-Message Scheduling Thread
pain_points.description: You send out meeting requests. Someone in Tokyo can't make it. Someone in London has a conflict. You propose new times. Repeat. What should take 30 seconds takes 3 days and 47 Slack messages.

pain_points.title: The 'Sorry, I Thought That Was 3pm My Time' No-Show
pain_points.description: Time zone math is hard. Someone inevitably converts wrong, misses the meeting, and now you're scheduling a makeup meeting. Which means another 47-message thread.

pain_points.title: The Project Manager Who's Actually a Full-Time Scheduler
pain_points.description: You didn't sign up to be a human calendar coordinator. But here you are, spending 15+ hours a week just trying to get people in the same (virtual) room.

solution_section.headline: How It Works (Seriously, It's This Simple)

steps.title: Connect Your Calendar
steps.description: Link your Google Calendar, Outlook, or any calendar in 60 seconds. We sync your availability automatically.

steps.title: Set Your Preferences Once
steps.description: Tell us your working hours, time zone, and meeting preferences. Never repeat yourself again.

steps.title: We Find the Perfect Time
steps.description: Our AI instantly analyzes everyone's availability across all time zones and suggests optimal meeting times. Your team just clicks 'yes.' Done.

features_section.headline: Everything You Need to Schedule Smarter

features.title: Smart Time Zone Detection
features.description: Automatically converts and displays meeting times in each participant's local time zone. No more mental math or embarrassing no-shows.

features.title: Team Availability Overlay
features.description: See everyone's availability at a glance with visual overlays that highlight when your entire team is free—across continents.

features.title: Instant Optimal Suggestions
features.description: Our algorithm considers time zones, working hours, meeting preferences, and calendar conflicts to suggest the best times in seconds, not days.

features.title: One-Click Scheduling
features.description: No more back-and-forth. Share a link, team members vote on suggested times, and the meeting auto-schedules when consensus is reached.

features.title: Integrates With Everything
features.description: Works seamlessly with Google Calendar, Outlook, Slack, Microsoft Teams, and Zoom. Fits right into your existing workflow.

social_proof_section.headline: Join 2,000+ Teams Who've Ditched the Scheduling Chaos

testimonials.quote: We used to spend the first 10 minutes of every project kickoff just trying to schedule the next meeting. Now it's instant. Our team saves at least 15 hours a week—that's almost half a full-time employee just on scheduling.
testimonials.author: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: Managing a team across San Francisco, London, and Singapore was a nightmare. I was basically a full-time calendar coordinator. This tool gave me my job back. And my sanity.
testimonials.author: Marcus Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: The time zone conversion alone is worth it. No more 'wait, is that 3am for me?' panic. Everyone sees their local time automatically. Game changer for our distributed team.
testimonials.author: Priya Patel
